news.title: Uproar in Parliament Over Fazlur Rahman's 1971 War Remarks
news.summary: BNP lawmaker Fazlur Rahman (Kishoreganj-4) sparked a heated debate today by stating that families of 1971 martyrs and freedom fighters cannot join Jamaat-e-Islami, calling it a 'double offense.' He further stirred controversy by comparing the 1971 Liberation War to the 'Pacific Ocean' and the August 5 uprising to a 'well,' arguing the two should not be equated.

news.title: Bangladesh Enters Nuclear Era: Rooppur Plant Begins Fuel Loading
news.summary: The Rooppur Nuclear Power Plant officially moved into the startup phase today. Unit-1 began loading fuel into the reactor core, making Bangladesh the third South Asian country to generate nuclear energy.

news.title: US Rejects Iranian Proposal to End Middle East Conflict
news.summary: The Trump administration indicated it is unlikely to accept Iran's latest offer to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, citing concerns over nuclear weapon development.

news.title: Google Signs Landmark AI Deal with the Pentagon
news.summary: Google finalized a partnership with the U.S. Defense Department for AI research, sparking internal debate regarding the ethical implications of classified military projects.

news.title: World Bank: Morocco Reforms Could Generate 1.7 Million Jobs
news.summary: A new report highlights that structural reforms in Morocco could increase real GDP by 20% and create millions of jobs for youth and women by 2035.

news.title: Go Web Framework Survey: Gin and Echo Lead in 2026
news.summary: Latest data from the GoLand team reveals that 46% of Go developers are building web services, with Gin remaining the most popular framework.
